title: lithocarpus macphailii
intro: Lithocarpus macphailii, also known as Macphail's Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus macphailii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as in tinctures and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
